claim_bullets.bullet_text: 'The Carpenter' was a JavaScript programmer, well-known for a meticulous attention to detail and love for hand-crafted, exquisitely joined code. (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.261-261)
The Carpenter normally worked through personal referrals, but from time to time a recruiter would slip through his screen. (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.261-261)
The Carpenter arrived early for his meeting with 'Thing Software,' and was shown to conference room 13. (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.261-261)
Plissken lined up a technical interview with a well-funded startup in San Francisco. (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.261-261)

source_record_text: Interlude: The Carpenter Interviews for a Job
